segments.text: Preserve me, O God, for in you I take refuge.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I say to the LORD, 'You are my Lord; I have no good apart from you.'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: As for the saints in the land, they are the excellent ones, in whom is all my delight.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The sorrows of those who run after another god shall multiply; their drink offerings of blood I will not pour out or take their names on my lips.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: hasten…: or, give gifts to another

segments.text: The LORD is my chosen portion and my cup; you hold my lot.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: of mine…: Heb. of my part

segments.text: The lines have fallen for me in pleasant places; indeed, I have a beautiful inheritance.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I bless the LORD who gives me counsel; in the night also my heart instructs me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I have set the LORD always before me; because he is at my right hand, I shall not be shaken.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Therefore my heart is glad, and my whole being rejoices; my flesh also dwells secure.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For you will not abandon my soul to Sheol, or let your holy one see corruption.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You make known to me the path of life; in your presence there is fullness of joy; at your right hand are pleasures forevermore.
segments.speaker: David
